overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path through rural countryside. The character passes a wooden windmill, carved signposts, and beehives while traveling through sunlit grassy fields with a distant castle visible on the horizon.

events.description: path curves right passing large willow tree
windmill exits frame right as path continues into open fields

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along dirt path toward windmill with swords on back

entered.detail: large wooden windmill with dark sails on grassy hill
tall leafy tree with drooping branches beside the path
winding dirt trail through tall grass
tall stone towers visible on horizon
rolling green hills with tall grass

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt trail through tall grass toward a large wooden windmill. A prominent willow tree stands beside the path as the character approaches and passes the windmill structure, revealing open countryside beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside with distant castle views

agents.ego_description: continuing along winding dirt path through open fields with scattered trees

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into rolling grassland with a distant castle visible on the horizon. The path winds through sparse pine trees as the character approaches a wooden signpost with a carved bird figure.

segments.scene_description: The character passes the distinctive wooden signpost topped with a bird carving. The path runs alongside a grassy embankment with sunflowers blooming on the left and traditional wooden beehives stacked on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooded trail with dense tree canopy

small stone ruins or markers beside path

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through a densely wooded area with tall trees creating dappled shade overhead. Stone structures and wooden barriers line the path as the character proceeds through the shaded section toward the distant village.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit rural landscape that transitions from open fields into a shaded woodland path. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt trail through tall grass, passing a prominent willow tree and a large wooden windmill that opens up to the wider countryside. As the path winds through rolling grasslands, the view expands to reveal a distant castle on the horizon before the camera approaches a wooden signpost topped with a carved bird. The scene then shifts alongside a grassy embankment lined with blooming sunflowers and stacked wooden beehives, moving steadily forward. Finally, the trail enters a densely wooded area where tall trees create dappled shade over stone structures and wooden barriers leading toward a distant village.
